    *   **Review of Current Visit Record (Diagnoses Made):** The diagnoses listed in the current visit record are: Other postoperative infection; Pneumonitis due to inhalation of food or vomitus; Hyposmolality and/or hyponatremia; Other inflammatory disorders of male genital organs; Other specified surgical operations and procedures causing abnormal patient reaction, or later complication; Chronic airway obstruction; Cirrhosis of liver; Anemia of other chronic disease; Malignant neoplasm of prostate; Diabetes mellitus; Unspecified schizophrenia; Other hemolytic anemias.
    *   **Absence of Explicit Lipid Disorder Diagnosis:** Crucially, there is no explicit diagnosis of hypercholesterolemia, hyperlipidemia, hyperlipoproteinemia, or any other specific "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in the current record.
